title: Methods of manufacturing bulk acoustic wave resonators with patterned mass loading layers
abstract: Methods of manufacturing bulk acoustic wave resonators are disclosed. During a common processing step, a first patterned mass loading layer for a first bulk acoustic wave resonator is formed and a second patterned mass loading layer for a second bulk acoustic wave resonator is formed. The first patterned mass loading layer has a different density than the second patterned mass loading layer.
claims: 1. A method of manufacturing bulk acoustic wave resonators, the method comprising: providing a bulk acoustic wave resonator structure including a support substrate; and during a common processing step, forming (i) a first patterned mass loading layer on the bulk acoustic wave resonator structure in a first area for a first bulk acoustic wave resonator, the first patterned mass loading layer having a duty factor in a range from 0.05 to 0.95 in a main acoustically active region of the first bulk acoustic wave resonator, and (ii) a second patterned mass loading layer on the bulk acoustic wave resonator structure in a second area for a second bulk acoustic wave resonator, the second patterned mass loading layer having a different density than the first patterned mass loading layer.
